portalone.label: PortalOne
portalone.style: PortalOne house style: 1980s retro-futurist synthwave / outrun aesthetic reimagined with modern CGI polish — glowing neon edges, chrome and holographic surfaces, deep night-blue to black starfield backdrops, hot magenta (#FE00A5), electric cyan (#00E8FF) and violet (#C13BFF) light, cream (#F7FFD3) highlights, lens flares and bloom, sunset perspective grids, volumetric haze; everything tactile and dimensional, never flat — skeuomorphic depth, playful scale, optimistic adventurous arcade-gaming energy
portalone.motion: Kinetic neon motion — light streaks and parallax depth, retro grid fly-throughs, glossy chrome reflections, lens-flare wipes, on-beat energetic pacing; sound design and object glow carry the story

fonts.heading: Dharma Gothic M — Ex Bold Italic (caps only, keep short)
fonts.accent: Outrun Future — Regular (80s brush script, sub-headings)

principles: Reinterpret the source material — never a pastiche; remix the 80s with today's technology
Immerse in the experience — never flat, embrace skeuomorphism, play with scale, every object touchable
Atmosphere crafted through effects — lens flare, object glow, neon edging and sound design are crucial
portalone.values: Brumble = Brave + Humble · Confident, Encouraging, Creative
portalone.notes: Backgrounds run deep night-blue to black with starfields; cream (#F7FFD3) reads as the warm light. Logo is the neon 'Portal ONE' chrome wordmark inside an inverted triangle — main logo on dark only, mono white on dark, mono black on bright. Material and palette stay locked across every shot of a sequence.

portalone-centipede.label: Centipede
portalone-centipede.tagline: Kill the centipedes with the amazing launcher
portalone-centipede.style: Centipede game skin: vivid arcade pixel-art energy over PortalOne synthwave — lush green (#79B153) and bright sky-blue (#95DFF5) with hot-red (#BC2105) accents, a segmented glowing centipede creature, launcher action, fast and playful

portalone-blockbuster.label: Blockbuster
portalone-blockbuster.style: Blockbuster game skin: block-shooter arcade over PortalOne synthwave — purple (#7830CC), icy blue (#A6E1FF), teal (#2DA4AE) and warm tan (#C6AC78), stacked neon blocks exploding on impact, satisfying chunky depth

portalone-thebeat.label: The Beat
portalone-thebeat.tagline: Hit the beat on time with precision
portalone-thebeat.style: The Beat game skin: rhythm-game neon over PortalOne synthwave — magenta (#CC22B3), gold-yellow (#FFDD46) and electric blue, pulsing on-beat glow, equalizer bars and reactive light

portalone-rally.label: Rally
portalone-rally.tagline: Go fast, shoot your opponents, get high scores
portalone-rally.style: Rally game skin: high-speed racing arcade over PortalOne synthwave — hot yellow (#FAFF00) and gold (#FFC801), motion-blur speed lines, chrome car, aggressive and fast

portalone-arcadeshow.label: ArcadeShow
portalone-arcadeshow.style: ArcadeShow skin: game-show spectacle over PortalOne synthwave — marquee bulb lights, magenta and gold, confetti sparkle, big-stage neon energy
portalone-arcadeshow.notes: Demo stub — refine palette/fonts from the ArcadeShow game guide when available.

portalone-quiztopia.label: Quiztopia
portalone-quiztopia.style: Quiztopia skin: friendly trivia world over PortalOne synthwave — cyan and violet, rounded neon question-mark motifs, warm and inviting
portalone-quiztopia.notes: Demo stub — refine palette/fonts from the Quiztopia game guide when available.

starxi.label: StarXI
starxi.style: StarXI brand: collectible figurine style, slim athletic build, sculpted cultural platform base, gold cream and deep green palette, shield crest with star and XI, stadium energy, premium-but-playful
starxi.notes: Chroma key background: flat magenta #FF1FB4. 96 nation characters.

strikelab.label: StrikeLab
strikelab.style: StrikeLab brand: clean, technical, precise, modern golf aesthetic, minimal composition
